componentDescription: A customizable component for entering One-Time Passwords with visual feedback and detailed styling options.

id.description: A unique identifier for the OTP input field.

error.description: An error object or message to display for validation feedback.

helperText.description: Supplemental text to guide the user or provide additional information.

name.description: The name attribute for the input field, useful for form submission.

label.description: A descriptive label for the OTP input component.

length.description: The total number of digits/characters expected in the OTP.

placeholder.description: Placeholder text displayed when the input field is empty.

isReadOnly.description: Indicates whether the input field should be read-only.

isDisabled.description: Indicates whether the input field should be disabled.

isAutoFocus.description: Determines if the input field should automatically gain focus on component mount.

type.description: Specifies the type of OTP input (e.g., numeric, alphanumeric).

onComplete.description: Callback function invoked when all OTP digits have been entered.

onChange.description: Callback function invoked when the value of the input changes.

onChangeText.description: Callback function invoked when the text content of the input changes.

onBlur.description: Callback function invoked when the input field loses focus.

onKeyPress.description: Callback function invoked when a key is pressed down and then released.

onKeyDown.description: Callback function invoked when a key is pressed down.

onClick.description: Callback function invoked when the input field is clicked.

onFocus.description: Callback function invoked when the input field gains focus.

pattern.description: A regular expression or string pattern to validate the input.

pasteTransformer.description: A function to transform pasted content before it's processed by the input.

stepValues.description: An array of numbers used for specific stepping behavior, if applicable.

size.description: Determines the visual size of the OTP input component.

shadow.description: Applies shadow styling to the OTP input, supporting various shadow types.

shape.description: Defines the visual shape of the OTP input fields (e.g., rounded, square).

variant.description: Specifies the visual variant of the OTP input (e.g., filled, outlined).

gap.description: The spacing in pixels between individual OTP digit input fields.

views.description: Custom styles to be applied to different parts of the OTP input component.
